agent_runs.final_text:
I have completed the weekly betting session. I searched for fresh news and consensus odds for upcoming WNBA and MLB games. 

With many orderbooks currently thin, I placed resting limit orders priced to capture a solid positive expected value against my vig-free implied probabilities:
1. **NY Liberty (WNBA vs. Dallas):** Despite the Wings being on a hot streak, the Liberty remain slight moneyline favorites (~-137), giving them a fair win probability of roughly 54.2%. I rested a limit bid at 50c to buy YES.
2. **Houston Astros (MLB vs. Miami):** The Astros are favored (-145 to -150 depending on the book) over the Marlins. I estimated a 56.8% fair probability and rested a limit bid at 52c for YES.

I deployed $23.00 in total across these two markets, staying under my strict 50% equity limit ($23.74) while meeting the minimum required thresholds. All orders provide several cents of edge after the exchange fees.
